message:
feat: Add bayes_factor module, action/plan scaffolds, alpha-investing

pt-math/bayes_factor.rs:
- e_value_from_log_bf with overflow-safe handling
- delta_bits for MDL interpretation
- EvidenceStrength enum (Jeffreys scale)
- EvidenceDirection and EvidenceSummary structs
- 32 comprehensive tests

pt-core additions (from parallel agents):
- action/mod.rs scaffold
- plan/mod.rs scaffold
- decision/alpha_investing.rs
- decision/enforcer.rs

Total: 174 tests passing in pt-math

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 # Structured logging
 tracing = "0.1"
